name: Enchilada Bean Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray.
3. In a skillet over low heat, cook garlic, onion, and mushrooms in 1/4 cup water until tender.
4. Add beans, tomatoes, wine, chili powder, and cumin; stir until well combined.
5. Heat mixture over medium-high heat until boiling, then reduce heat and simmer for about 30 minutes or until most of the liquid has evaporated. Using a potato masher, mash the beans thoroughly.
6. In a bowl, mix cottage cheese and yogurt; set aside.
7. In the prepared casserole dish, layer tortillas, beans, and a little cheese mixture. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, for about 30 minutes or until bubbling.
